title: Coinbase Global Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Wall Street analysts forecast average 1-year price target for COIN of $378.82, with low forecast of $174.04 and high forecast of $535.50. Recent Q1 2026 results show Coinbase posted EPS of -$1.49 versus expected $0.29, with revenue of $1.4 billion missing $1.56 billion forecast amid 20%+ crypto market decline. Company forecasts Q2 2026 revenue of $1.6 billion rising to $1.9 billion by Q4 2026, focusing on derivatives and prediction markets for growth diversification. Projected compound annual growth rate for revenue over next 3 years is 10%, while operating income projected to grow at 12% CAGR. While analysts remain bullish on company's long-term prospects, recent quarterly earnings disappointed consensus estimates, reflecting challenges from cryptocurrency market downturn.
